title: Mission: Replace Beads with Atelier for tracking and Agent Factory
description: Replace Beads with Atelier in two places: this repository's own work tracking, and the Agent Factory skill's default tracker workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Atelier is the configured tracker in AGENTS.md for /root/atelier; current Beads issues/dependencies/statuses/labels/notes are migrated or explicitly waived.
notes: 2026-06-08 orchestration: replacement is sequenced after a stable Atelier baseline.

title: Implement Beads data import into Atelier state
description: Implement an import path from current Beads data into Atelier.
acceptance_criteria: A command can import .beads/issues.manual.jsonl into Atelier SQLite and/or .atelier; migrated record counts match the source; dependencies and parent-child relationships round-trip.

title: Dogfood Atelier as this repository's live tracker
description: Cut /root/atelier over from Beads to Atelier after the import, command parity, and storage checks pass.
acceptance_criteria: AGENTS.md declares Atelier as the tracker and lists Atelier sync/check commands; current Beads data is archived read-only.
